Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence**  
Official launch of RLUSD on April 19, 2026, coincides with record XRPL transaction volumes and XRP ETF approvals nearing final stages, fueling capital influx and payment rail adoption by central banks[2]. Supporting price momentum noted in late April analyses, though dated slightly earlier[1][3].
